director.name: 阿兰·卡瓦利埃 Alain Cavalier

this_title: Six portraits XL 2: Jacquotte et Daniel
trans_title: 六幅巨型肖像2：雅科特与丹尼尔
introduction: Jacquotte: Once a year, in July, on the road of her holidays, during a few hours, Jacquotte revives her childhood in the house remained intact of her beloved parents. They have been dead for qigou.cc a long time, but nothing has been touched. One day, it may be necessary to sell .
chinese_title: 六幅巨型肖像2：雅科特与丹尼尔
